predicate_mappings.linked_change_request: {} is linked to the change request {}
predicate_mappings.review_request_active: the review request for {} is active
predicate_mappings.variant_change_ticket_linkable: {} is a variant change ticket linkable to {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_assignee: {} is eligible for the action item {}
predicate_mappings.applicable_change_request: {} is applicable to the action item {}
predicate_mappings.applicable_infrastructure: {} is applicable to the action item {}
predicate_mappings.applicable_component: {} is applicable to the action item {}
predicate_mappings.applicable_external_dependency: {} is applicable to the action item {}

predicate_mappings.applicable_vendor_contact: {} is applicable for the action item {}

create_action_item.description: create an action item A as an open action item
preconditions: I can only create an action item A as an open action item if it is not the case that A is an open action item and it is not the case that A has been closed
effects: Once I create an action item A as an open action item, it is the case that A is an open action item

assign_action_item.description: assign an action item A to an assignee candidate B
preconditions: I can only assign an action item A to an assignee candidate B if it is the case that A is an open action item and B is available and B is eligible for the action item A
I can only assign an action item A to an assignee candidate B if it is not the case that A has an assignment
effects: Once I assign an action item A to an assignee candidate B, it is the case that A is assigned to B and A has an assignment
Once I assign an action item A to an assignee candidate B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unassign_action_item.description: unassign an action item A from an assignee candidate B
preconditions: I can only unassign an action item A from an assignee candidate B if it is the case that A is assigned to B
I can only unassign an action item A from an assignee candidate B if it is not the case that implementation has started for A and it is not the case that approvals have been collected for A
effects: Once I unassign an action item A from an assignee candidate B, it is the case that B is available

Once I unassign an action item A from an assignee candidate B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to B and it is not the case anymore that A has an assignment and it is not the case anymore that A has confirmed readiness and it is not the case anymore that A is implemented and it is not the case anymore that the review request for A is active and it is not the case anymore that A is scheduled for execution and it is not the case anymore that the implementation of A is recorded

attach_runbook.description: attach a runbook B to an action item A
preconditions: I can only attach a runbook B to an action item A if it is the case that A is an open action item and B is available
effects: Once I attach a runbook B to an action item A, it is the case that B is attached to A
Once I attach a runbook B to an action item A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_runbook.description: detach a runbook B from an action item A
preconditions: I can only detach a runbook B from an action item A if it is the case that B is attached to A
effects: Once I detach a runbook B from an action item A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a runbook B from an action item A, it is not the case anymore that B is attached to A

acknowledge_runbook_assignment.description: acknowledge the assignment of a runbook B to an action item A
preconditions: I can only acknowledge the assignment of a runbook B to an action item A if it is the case that A is an open action item and A has an assignment and B is attached to A
I can only acknowledge the assignment of a runbook B to an action item A if it is not the case that A has confirmed readiness
effects: Once I acknowledge the assignment of a runbook B to an action item A, it is the case that A has confirmed readiness

assign_reviewer.description: assign a reviewer B to review an action item A
preconditions: I can only assign a reviewer B to review an action item A if it is the case that A is an open action item and A has an assignment and B is available
I can only assign a reviewer B to review an action item A if it is not the case that A has confirmed readiness
effects: Once I assign a reviewer B to review an action item A, it is the case that A has confirmed readiness and the review request for A is active
Once I assign a reviewer B to review an action item A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

start_automation_runbook.description: start a runbook B for an action item A using an automation tool C
preconditions: I can only start a runbook B for an action item A using an automation tool C if it is the case that A has confirmed readiness and A has an assignment and B is attached to A and C is available
I can only start a runbook B for an action item A using an automation tool C if it is not the case that A is implemented
effects: Once I start a runbook B for an action item A using an automation tool C, it is the case that A is implemented
Once I start a runbook B for an action item A using an automation tool C, it is not the case anymore that the review request for A is active

trigger_change_ticket_execution.description: trigger execution of a change ticket record B for an action item A
preconditions: I can only trigger execution of a change ticket record B for an action item A if it is the case that A has an assignment and A is associated with B
I can only trigger execution of a change ticket record B for an action item A if it is not the case that A is implemented
effects: Once I trigger execution of a change ticket record B for an action item A, it is the case that A is implemented
Once I trigger execution of a change ticket record B for an action item A, it is not the case anymore that the review request for A is active

reserve_infrastructure.description: reserve an infrastructure resource B for an action item A
preconditions: I can only reserve an infrastructure resource B for an action item A if it is the case that A is an open action item and B is available and B is applicable to the action item A
effects: Once I reserve an infrastructure resource B for an action item A, it is the case that A has reserved the infrastructure resource B
Once I reserve an infrastructure resource B for an action item A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_infrastructure.description: release an infrastructure resource B from an action item A
preconditions: I can only release an infrastructure resource B from an action item A if it is the case that A has reserved the infrastructure resource B
effects: Once I release an infrastructure resource B from an action item A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an infrastructure resource B from an action item A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the infrastructure resource B

reserve_component.description: reserve an application component B for an action item A
preconditions: I can only reserve an application component B for an action item A if it is the case that A is an open action item and B is available and B is applicable to the action item A
effects: Once I reserve an application component B for an action item A, it is the case that A has reserved the application component B
Once I reserve an application component B for an action item A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_component.description: release an application component B from an action item A
preconditions: I can only release an application component B from an action item A if it is the case that A has reserved the application component B
effects: Once I release an application component B from an action item A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an application component B from an action item A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the application component B

reserve_external_dependency.description: reserve an external dependency B for an action item A
preconditions: I can only reserve an external dependency B for an action item A if it is the case that A is an open action item and B is available and B is applicable to the action item A
effects: Once I reserve an external dependency B for an action item A, it is the case that A has reserved the external dependency B
Once I reserve an external dependency B for an action item A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_external_dependency.description: release an external dependency B from an action item A
preconditions: I can only release an external dependency B from an action item A if it is the case that A has reserved the external dependency B
effects: Once I release an external dependency B from an action item A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an external dependency B from an action item A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the external dependency B

reserve_vendor_contact.description: reserve a vendor contact B for an action item A
preconditions: I can only reserve a vendor contact B for an action item A if it is the case that A is an open action item and B is available and B is applicable for the action item A
effects: Once I reserve a vendor contact B for an action item A, it is the case that A has reserved the vendor contact B
Once I reserve a vendor contact B for an action item A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_vendor_contact.description: release a vendor contact B from an action item A
preconditions: I can only release a vendor contact B from an action item A if it is the case that A has reserved the vendor contact B
effects: Once I release a vendor contact B from an action item A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a vendor contact B from an action item A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the vendor contact B

initiate_execution.description: initiate execution of an action item A using a change request plan B, an infrastructure resource C, and an application component D
preconditions: I can only initiate execution of an action item A using a change request plan B, an infrastructure resource C, and an application component D if it is the case that A has an assignment and A has reserved the infrastructure resource C and A has reserved the application component D and B is available and B is applicable to the action item A

I can only initiate execution of an action item A using a change request plan B, an infrastructure resource C, and an application component D if it is not the case that implementation has started for A
effects: Once I initiate execution of an action item A using a change request plan B, an infrastructure resource C, and an application component D, it is the case that A is linked to the change request B and implementation has started for A
Once I initiate execution of an action item A using a change request plan B, an infrastructure resource C, and an application component D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

initiate_external_execution.description: initiate external execution of an action item A using a change request plan B, an external dependency C, and a test environment D
preconditions: I can only initiate external execution of an action item A using a change request plan B, an external dependency C, and a test environment D if it is the case that A has an assignment and A has reserved the external dependency C and D is available and B is available and B is applicable to the action item A and D is compatible with the action item A

I can only initiate external execution of an action item A using a change request plan B, an external dependency C, and a test environment D if it is not the case that implementation has started for A
effects: Once I initiate external execution of an action item A using a change request plan B, an external dependency C, and a test environment D, it is the case that A is linked to the change request B and implementation has started for A and the implementation of A is recorded and the review request for A is active

Once I initiate external execution of an action item A using a change request plan B, an external dependency C, and a test environment D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

finalize_initial_housekeeping.description: finalize initial housekeeping for an action item A using an infrastructure resource B and an application component C
preconditions: I can only finalize initial housekeeping for an action item A using an infrastructure resource B and an application component C if it is the case that implementation has started for A and the implementation of A is recorded and A has reserved the infrastructure resource B and A has reserved the application component C
effects: Once I finalize initial housekeeping for an action item A using an infrastructure resource B and an application component C, it is not the case anymore that the implementation of A is recorded and it is not the case anymore that the review request for A is active

collect_approvals.description: collect approvals for an action item A using an infrastructure resource B, an application component C, and an approver D
preconditions: I can only collect approvals for an action item A using an infrastructure resource B, an application component C, and an approver D if it is the case that A is implemented and implementation has started for A and A has reserved the infrastructure resource B and A has reserved the application component C and D is associated with the action item A

I can only collect approvals for an action item A using an infrastructure resource B, an application component C, and an approver D if it is not the case that the review request for A is active and it is not the case that approvals have been collected for A
effects: Once I collect approvals for an action item A using an infrastructure resource B, an application component C, and an approver D, it is the case that approvals have been collected for A

collect_authority_approval.description: collect authority approval for an action item A using an external dependency B, a vendor contact C, and an authority D
preconditions: I can only collect authority approval for an action item A using an external dependency B, a vendor contact C, and an authority D if it is the case that A is implemented and implementation has started for A and A has reserved the external dependency B and A has reserved the vendor contact C and D is associated with the action item A
I can only collect authority approval for an action item A using an external dependency B, a vendor contact C, and an authority D if it is not the case that approvals have been collected for A
effects: Once I collect authority approval for an action item A using an external dependency B, a vendor contact C, and an authority D, it is the case that approvals have been collected for A and the review request for A is active

post_approval_mark_execution_scheduled.description: post approval and mark an action item A as execution scheduled with an infrastructure resource B and an application component C
preconditions: I can only post approval and mark an action item A as execution scheduled with an infrastructure resource B and an application component C if it is the case that approvals have been collected for A and the review request for A is active and A has reserved the infrastructure resource B and A has reserved the application component C
effects: Once I post approval and mark an action item A as execution scheduled with an infrastructure resource B and an application component C, it is the case that A is scheduled for execution

Once I post approval and mark an action item A as execution scheduled with an infrastructure resource B and an application component C, it is not the case anymore that the review request for A is active and it is not the case anymore that A is implemented and it is not the case anymore that the implementation of A is recorded

execute_runbook_via_automation.description: execute a runbook B via an automation tool C for an action item A
preconditions: I can only execute a runbook B via an automation tool C for an action item A if it is the case that A is scheduled for execution and approvals have been collected for A and A has an assignment and B is attached to A and C is available
I can only execute a runbook B via an automation tool C for an action item A if it is not the case that A is implemented
effects: Once I execute a runbook B via an automation tool C for an action item A, it is the case that A is implemented

mark_execution_verified_by_runbook.description: mark execution of an action item A as verified by a runbook B
preconditions: I can only mark execution of an action item A as verified by a runbook B if it is the case that approvals have been collected for A and A is implemented and B is attached to A
I can only mark execution of an action item A as verified by a runbook B if it is not the case that the review request for A is active and it is not the case that execution has been verified for A
effects: Once I mark execution of an action item A as verified by a runbook B, it is the case that execution has been verified for A

mark_execution_verified_by_reviewer.description: mark execution of an action item A as verified by a reviewer B
preconditions: I can only mark execution of an action item A as verified by a reviewer B if it is the case that approvals have been collected for A and A is implemented and B is available
I can only mark execution of an action item A as verified by a reviewer B if it is not the case that the review request for A is active and it is not the case that execution has been verified for A
effects: Once I mark execution of an action item A as verified by a reviewer B, it is the case that execution has been verified for A
Once I mark execution of an action item A as verified by a reviewer B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

reserve_change_ticket.description: reserve a change ticket record B for an action item A
preconditions: I can only reserve a change ticket record B for an action item A if it is the case that execution has been verified for A and B is available for change and A is applicable to B
effects: Once I reserve a change ticket record B for an action item A, it is the case that the change ticket B is reserved for the action item A
Once I reserve a change ticket record B for an action item A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for change

link_variants_to_change_ticket.description: link an action item variant b A and an action item variant an action item variant a B to a change ticket record C
preconditions: I can only link an action item variant b A and an action item variant an action item variant a B to a change ticket record C if it is the case that A is an open action item and A is marked as variant b and A is a variant change ticket linkable to C and the change ticket C is reserved for the action item B
I can only link an action item variant b A and an action item variant an action item variant a B to a change ticket record C if it is not the case that A is associated with C
effects: Once I link an action item variant b A and an action item variant an action item variant a B to a change ticket record C, it is the case that A is associated with C

acknowledge_automation_completion.description: acknowledge completion of automation for an action item A using a runbook B and an automation tool C
preconditions: I can only acknowledge completion of automation for an action item A using a runbook B and an automation tool C if it is the case that A is an open action item and A is marked as variant b and A is implemented and execution has been verified for A and B is attached to A and C is available
I can only acknowledge completion of automation for an action item A using a runbook B and an automation tool C if it is not the case that automation for A is completed
effects: Once I acknowledge completion of automation for an action item A using a runbook B and an automation tool C, it is the case that automation for A is completed

close_action_item_variant_a_path.description: close an action item A following variant a path
preconditions: I can only close an action item A following variant a path if it is the case that A is marked as variant a and A is an open action item and A has an assignment and implementation has started for A and approvals have been collected for A and execution has been verified for A and A is implemented
I can only close an action item A following variant a path if it is not the case that A has been closed
effects: Once I close an action item A following variant a path, it is the case that A has been closed

close_action_item_with_change_ticket.description: close an action item A with a change ticket record B
preconditions: I can only close an action item A with a change ticket record B if it is the case that A is marked as variant b and A is an open action item and A has an assignment and implementation has started for A and approvals have been collected for A and execution has been verified for A and A is implemented and A is associated with B
I can only close an action item A with a change ticket record B if it is not the case that A has been closed
effects: Once I close an action item A with a change ticket record B, it is the case that A has been closed

close_action_item_with_automation.description: close an action item A with automation
preconditions: I can only close an action item A with automation if it is the case that A is marked as variant b and A is an open action item and A has an assignment and implementation has started for A and approvals have been collected for A and execution has been verified for A and A is implemented and automation for A is completed
I can only close an action item A with automation if it is not the case that A has been closed
effects: Once I close an action item A with automation, it is the case that A has been closed

action_nl_templates.create_action_item: create action item {?action_item} as an open action item

action_nl_templates.unassign_action_item: unassign action item {?action_item} from assignee candidate {?assignee}

action_nl_templates.release_external_dependency: release external dependency {?external_dependency} from action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates.reserve_vendor_contact: reserve vendor contact {?vendor_contact} for action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates.release_vendor_contact: release vendor contact {?vendor_contact} from action item {?action_item}

action_nl_templates.initiate_external_execution: initiate external execution of action item {?action_item} using change request plan {?change_request}, external dependency {?external_dependency}, and test environment {?test_environment}
action_nl_templates.finalize_initial_housekeeping: finalize initial housekeeping for action item {?action_item} using infrastructure resource {?infrastructure_resource} and application component {?application_component}

action_nl_templates.collect_authority_approval: collect authority approval for action item {?action_item} using external dependency {?external_dependency}, vendor contact {?vendor_contact}, and authority {?authority}
action_nl_templates.post_approval_mark_execution_scheduled: post approval and mark action item {?action_item} as execution scheduled with infrastructure resource {?infrastructure_resource} and application component {?application_component}
action_nl_templates.execute_runbook_via_automation: execute runbook {?runbook} via automation tool {?automation_tool} for action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates.mark_execution_verified_by_runbook: mark execution of action item {?action_item} as verified by runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates.mark_execution_verified_by_reviewer: mark execution of action item {?action_item} as verified by reviewer {?reviewer}
action_nl_templates.reserve_change_ticket: reserve change ticket record {?change_ticket} for action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates.link_variants_to_change_ticket: link action item variant b {?action_item_variant_b} and action item variant a {?action_item_variant_a} to change ticket record {?change_ticket}

predicate_nl_templates.linked_change_request: {?action_item} is linked to the change request {?change_request}
predicate_nl_templates.review_request_active: the review request for {?action_item} is active
predicate_nl_templates.variant_change_ticket_linkable: {?action_item} is a variant change ticket linkable to {?change_ticket}
predicate_nl_templates.eligible_assignee: {?assignee} is eligible for the action item {?action_item}
predicate_nl_templates.applicable_change_request: {?change_request} is applicable to the action item {?action_item}
predicate_nl_templates.applicable_infrastructure: {?infrastructure_resource} is applicable to the action item {?action_item}
predicate_nl_templates.applicable_component: {?application_component} is applicable to the action item {?action_item}
predicate_nl_templates.applicable_external_dependency: {?external_dependency} is applicable to the action item {?action_item}
predicate_nl_templates.compatible_test_environment: {?test_environment} is compatible with the action item {?action_item}
predicate_nl_templates.applicable_vendor_contact: {?vendor_contact} is applicable for the action item {?action_item}
predicate_nl_templates.approver_group_association: {?approver_group} is associated with the action item {?action_item}
predicate_nl_templates.change_ticket_reserved_for_item: the change ticket {?change_ticket} is reserved for the action item {?action_item}

action_nl_templates_indef.create_action_item: create an action item {?action_item} as an open action item
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_action_item: assign an action item {?action_item} to an assignee candidate {?assignee}
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_action_item: unassign an action item {?action_item} from an assignee candidate {?assignee}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_runbook: attach a runbook {?runbook} to an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_runbook: detach a runbook {?runbook} from an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.acknowledge_runbook_assignment: acknowledge the assignment of a runbook {?runbook} to an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_reviewer: assign a reviewer {?reviewer} to review an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.start_automation_runbook: start a runbook {?runbook} for an action item {?action_item} using an automation tool {?automation_tool}
action_nl_templates_indef.trigger_change_ticket_execution: trigger execution of a change ticket record {?change_ticket} for an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_infrastructure: reserve an infrastructure resource {?infrastructure_resource} for an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_infrastructure: release an infrastructure resource {?infrastructure_resource} from an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_component: reserve an application component {?application_component} for an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_component: release an application component {?application_component} from an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_external_dependency: reserve an external dependency {?external_dependency} for an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_external_dependency: release an external dependency {?external_dependency} from an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_vendor_contact: reserve a vendor contact {?vendor_contact} for an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_vendor_contact: release a vendor contact {?vendor_contact} from an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_execution: initiate execution of an action item {?action_item} using a change request plan {?change_request}, an infrastructure resource {?infrastructure_resource}, and an application component {?application_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_external_execution: initiate external execution of an action item {?action_item} using a change request plan {?change_request}, an external dependency {?external_dependency}, and a test environment {?test_environment}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_initial_housekeeping: finalize initial housekeeping for an action item {?action_item} using an infrastructure resource {?infrastructure_resource} and an application component {?application_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.collect_approvals: collect approvals for an action item {?action_item} using an infrastructure resource {?infrastructure_resource}, an application component {?application_component}, and an approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.collect_authority_approval: collect authority approval for an action item {?action_item} using an external dependency {?external_dependency}, a vendor contact {?vendor_contact}, and an authority {?authority}
action_nl_templates_indef.post_approval_mark_execution_scheduled: post approval and mark an action item {?action_item} as execution scheduled with an infrastructure resource {?infrastructure_resource} and an application component {?application_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.execute_runbook_via_automation: execute a runbook {?runbook} via an automation tool {?automation_tool} for an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_execution_verified_by_runbook: mark execution of an action item {?action_item} as verified by a runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_execution_verified_by_reviewer: mark execution of an action item {?action_item} as verified by a reviewer {?reviewer}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_change_ticket: reserve a change ticket record {?change_ticket} for an action item {?action_item}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_variants_to_change_ticket: link an action item variant b {?action_item_variant_b} and an action item variant an action item variant a {?action_item_variant_a} to a change ticket record {?change_ticket}
action_nl_templates_indef.acknowledge_automation_completion: acknowledge completion of automation for an action item {?action_item} using a runbook {?runbook} and an automation tool {?automation_tool}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_action_item_variant_a_path: close an action item {?action_item} following variant a path
action_nl_templates_indef.close_action_item_with_change_ticket: close an action item {?action_item} with a change ticket record {?change_ticket}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_action_item_with_automation: close an action item {?action_item} with automation

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a action item or a assignee candidate or a change request plan or a application component or a infrastructure resource or a external dependency or a runbook or a reviewer or a change ticket record or a automation tool or a test environment or a vendor contact or a approval role is also a object
Everything that is a approver or a authority is also a approval role
Everything that is a action item variant a or a action item variant b is also a action item
